eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Brewster; Bexar; El Paso; Harris; Hidalgo; Tarrant; Travis; Val Verde; Webb, TX; at 11:55 PM on JAN 7, 2019 Effective until 12:10 AM JAN 8, 2019. Message from DPSAUS.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM. IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, YOU WOULD HAVE BEEN GIVEN ADDITIONAL INSTRUCTIONS. THIS IS ONLY A TEST. NO ACTION NECESSARY.
